difficultyMetrics.difficultyNote: 45 tiles, 3 layers. Medium-high normal levels with more same-item traps.
difficultyMetrics.strategicGoal: Normal levels: start using real same-item traps. The player must choose the correct visible key to reveal the next required hidden item.
difficultyMetrics.rebalanceNotes: Reordered by difficulty score for smoother 1-100 progression; wrongTrayMaxSlots adjusted by new band. Board, orders, tile positions, and solution path are preserved.
